channel.title: Dahua Technologies — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Dahua Technologies (dahua).

item.title: CVE-2025-31703 · 2.4 LOW
item.description: A vulnerability found in Dahua NVR/XVR device. A third-party malicious attacker with physical access to the device may gain access to a restricted shell via the serial port, and bypasses the shell's authentication mechanism to escalate privileges.

item.title: CVE-2025-31702 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: A vulnerability exists in certain Dahua embedded products. Third-party malicious attacker with obtained normal user credentials could exploit the vulnerability to access certain data which are restricted to admin privileges, such as system-sensitive…

item.title: CVE-2025-31701 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. Attackers could exploit a buffer overflow vulnerability by sending specially crafted malicious packets, potentially causing service disruption (e.g., crashes) or remote code execution (RCE). Some devi…

item.title: CVE-2025-31700 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. Attackers could exploit a buffer overflow vulnerability by sending specially crafted malicious packets, potentially causing service disruption (e.g., crashes) or remote code execution (RCE). Some devi…

item.title: CVE-2024-39950 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. Attackers can send carefully crafted data packets to the interface with vulnerabilities to initiate device initialization.

item.title: CVE-2024-39949 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. Attackers can send carefully crafted data packets to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2024-39948 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. Attackers can send carefully crafted data packets to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2024-39947 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products.After obtaining the ordinary user's username and password, the attacker can send a carefully crafted data packet to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2024-39946 · 6 MEDIUM
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products.After obtaining the administrator's username and password, the attacker can send a carefully crafted data packet to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing device initialization.

item.title: CVE-2024-39945 · 4.9 MEDIUM
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products. After obtaining the administrator's username and password, the attacker can send a carefully crafted data packet to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2024-39944 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A vulnerability has been found in Dahua products.Attackers can send carefully crafted data packets to the interface with vulnerabilities, causing the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2022-30564 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua embedded products have a vulnerability of unauthorized modification of the device timestamp. By sending a specially crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker can modify the device system time.

item.title: CVE-2022-45434 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated un-throttled ICMP requests on remote DSS Server. After bypassing the firewall access control policy, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker co…

item.title: CVE-2022-45433 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated traceroute host from remote DSS Server. After bypassing the firewall access control policy, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker could get t…

item.title: CVE-2022-45432 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated search for devices. After bypassing the firewall access control policy, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker could unauthenticated search fo…

item.title: CVE-2022-45431 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated restart of remote DSS Server. After bypassing the firewall access control policy, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker could unauthenticated…

item.title: CVE-2022-45430 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated enable or disable SSHD service. After bypassing the firewall access control policy, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker could enable or dis…

item.title: CVE-2022-45429 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of server-side request forgery (SSRF). An Attacker can access internal resources by concatenating links (URL) that conform to specific rules.

item.title: CVE-2022-45428 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of sensitive information leakage. After obtaining the permissions of administrators, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker can obtain the debugging information.

item.title: CVE-2022-45427 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unrestricted upload of file. After obtaining the permissions of administrators, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker can upload arbitrary files.

item.title: CVE-2022-45426 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unrestricted download of file. After obtaining the permissions of ordinary users, by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface, an attacker can download arbitrary files.

item.title: CVE-2022-45425 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of using of hard-coded cryptographic key. An attacker can obtain the AES crypto key by exploiting this vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2022-45424 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated request of AES crypto key. An attacker can obtain the AES crypto key by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface.

item.title: CVE-2022-45423 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Some Dahua software products have a vulnerability of unauthenticated request of MQTT credentials. An attacker can obtain encrypted MQTT credentials by sending a specific crafted packet to the vulnerable interface (the credentials cannot be directly e…

item.title: CVE-2022-30563
item.description: When an attacker uses a man-in-the-middle attack to sniff the request packets with success logging in through ONVIF, he can log in to the device by replaying the user's login packet.

item.title: CVE-2022-30562
item.description: If the user enables the https function on the device, an attacker can modify the user’s request data packet through a man-in-the-middle attack ,Injection of a malicious URL in the Host: header of the HTTP Request results in a 302 redirect to an attac…

item.title: CVE-2022-30561
item.description: When an attacker uses a man-in-the-middle attack to sniff the request packets with success logging in, the attacker could log in to the device by replaying the user's login packet.

item.title: CVE-2022-30560
item.description: When an attacker obtaining the administrative account and password, or through a man-in-the-middle attack, the attacker could send a specified crafted packet to the vulnerable interface then lead the device to crash.

item.title: CVE-2021-33046
item.description: Some Dahua products have access control vulnerability in the password reset process. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability through specific deployments to reset device passwords.

item.title: CVE-2021-33045 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: The identity authentication bypass vulnerability found in some Dahua products during the login process. Attackers can bypass device identity authentication by constructing malicious data packets.

item.title: CVE-2021-33044 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: The identity authentication bypass vulnerability found in some Dahua products during the login process. Attackers can bypass device identity authentication by constructing malicious data packets.

item.title: CVE-2020-9502
item.description: Some Dahua products with Build time before December 2019 have Session ID predictable vulnerabilities. During normal user access, an attacker can use the predicted Session ID to construct a data packet to attack the device.

item.title: CVE-2020-9501
item.description: Attackers can obtain Cloud Key information from the Dahua Web P2P control in specific ways. Cloud Key is used to authenticate the connection between the client tool and the platform. An attacker may use the leaked Cloud Key to impersonate the client…

item.title: CVE-2019-9682
item.description: Dahua devices with Build time before December 2019 use strong security login mode by default, but in order to be compatible with the normal login of early devices, some devices retain the weak security login mode that users can control. If the user u…

item.title: CVE-2020-9500
item.description: Some products of Dahua have Denial of Service vulnerabilities. After the successful login of the legal account, the attacker sends a specific log query command, which may cause the device to go down.

item.title: CVE-2020-9499
item.description: Some Dahua products have buffer overflow vulnerabilities. After the successful login of the legal account, the attacker sends a specific DDNS test command, which may cause the device to go down.

item.title: CVE-2019-9677
item.description: The specific fields of CGI interface of some Dahua products are not strictly verified, an attacker can cause a buffer overflow by constructing malicious packets. Affected products include: IPC-HDW1X2X,IPC-HFW1X2X,IPC-HDW2X2X,IPC-HFW2X2X,IPC-HDW4X2X,I…

item.title: CVE-2019-9678
item.description: Some Dahua products have the problem of denial of service during the login process. An attacker can cause a device crashed by constructing a malicious packet. Affected products include: IPC-HDW1X2X,IPC-HFW1X2X,IPC-HDW2X2X,IPC-HFW2X2X,IPC-HDW4X2X,IPC-…

item.title: CVE-2019-9680
item.description: Some Dahua products have information leakage issues. Attackers can obtain the IP address and device model information of the device by constructing malicious data packets. Affected products include: IPC-HDW1X2X,IPC-HFW1X2X,IPC-HDW2X2X,IPC-HFW2X2X,IPC…

item.title: CVE-2019-9679
item.description: Some of Dahua's Debug functions do not have permission separation. Low-privileged users can use the Debug function after logging in. Affected products include: IPC-HDW1X2X,IPC-HFW1X2X,IPC-HDW2X2X,IPC-HFW2X2X,IPC-HDW4X2X,IPC-HFW4X2X,IPC-HDBW4X2X,IPC-H…

item.title: CVE-2019-9681
item.description: Online upgrade information in some firmware packages of Dahua products is not encrypted. Attackers can obtain this information by analyzing firmware packages by specific means. Affected products include: IPC-HDW1X2X,IPC-HFW1X2X,IPC-HDW2X2X,IPC-HFW2X2…

item.title: CVE-2019-9676
item.description: Buffer overflow vulnerability found in some Dahua IP Camera devices IPC-HFW1XXX,IPC-HDW1XXX,IPC-HFW2XXX Build before 2018/11. The vulnerability exits in the function of redirection display for serial port printing information, which can not be used b…

item.title: CVE-2017-9317
item.description: Privilege escalation vulnerability found in some Dahua IP devices. Attacker in possession of low privilege account can gain access to credential information of high privilege account and further obtain device information or attack the device.

item.title: CVE-2017-9315
item.description: Customer of Dahua IP camera or IP PTZ could submit relevant device information to receive a time limited temporary password from Dahua authorized dealer to reset the admin password. The algorithm used in this mechanism is potentially at risk of being…

item.title: CVE-2017-9316
item.description: Firmware upgrade authentication bypass vulnerability was found in Dahua IPC-HDW4300S and some IP products. The vulnerability was caused by internal Debug function. This particular function was used for problem analysis and performance tuning during p…

item.title: CVE-2017-9314
item.description: Authentication vulnerability found in Dahua NVR models NVR50XX, NVR52XX, NVR54XX, NVR58XX with software before DH_NVR5xxx_Eng_P_V2.616.0000.0.R.20171102. Attacker could exploit this vulnerability to gain access to additional operations by means of fo…
